name: Tabouli Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh parsley (measure 1st then chop into small pieces)
1/2 cup finely sliced green onions (both the white & green parts)
1/2 cup freshly squeezed lemon juice (about 3 small to med. lemons)
1/2 to 1 teaspoon of freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Put bulghur in a bowl and pour the boiling water over it. Cover with a towel and leave for one hour.
2. Dump into a mesh strainer and squish out as much water as possible.
3. Put the bulghur back in a bowl and add the rest of the ingredients. Mix well.
4. Refrigerate for at least two hours so flavors blend.
(I mixed the lemon juice with the garlic and pepper, and let them sit while I worked on the vegetables. Also, if you use salt, use a little just before eating. I think it's a little flat without it).
